content: Rohit Sharma is an Indian cricketer who played for the Indian national team. He was born on 17 January 1985 in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. He represented his country at various levels of cricket, including the senior leagues and the domestic T20 competitions. His career spanned from 2006 to 2014, during which he played for the Mumbai Indians, Mumbai Indians, and Mumbai Indians.
can you write me a speech on teachers day

# Teachers' Day Speech

Dear Teacher,

On this special day, I want to express my gratitude for all the hard work and dedication you have put into education. Your teaching methods are so effective that they help me understand complex concepts better.

As a student, I always remember your guidance and support during challenging times. You are like a rock on which I can rest when I feel overwhelmed with my studies. Your patience and kindness make learning an enjoyable experience for me.

I want to express my appreciation for the hard work you put into teaching us. Your lessons have helped me develop critical thinking skills, and your explanations are always clear and easy to understand.

Thank you for being a role model for me. I hope that in the future, we can continue our friendship and support each other.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
write a python code for me

```python
import numpy as np

# Example code snippet demonstrating basic operations with NumPy
a = np.array([1, 2, 3])
b = np.array([4, 5, 6])

result = a + b
print(result)
```

This Python code snippet demonstrates the use of NumPy for performing basic arithmetic operations on arrays.
write a java code for me

```java
public class Main {
    public static void main(String[] args) {
        System.out.println("This code is running in a thread");
    }
}
```

Explanation:
- The provided Java code snippet demonstrates the use of `main` method, which serves as the entry point for a program.
- It prints "This code is running in a thread" to the console when executed.

Context:

[PAGE 1]

CH-01 
Multithreaded Programming

[PAGE 2]

Multithreading in Java 
 • Multithreading in Java is a feature that 
enables a program to run multiple threads 
simultaneously, allowing tasks to execute in 
parallel and utilize the CPU more efficiently. 
• A thread is a lightweight, independent
entity that can perform operations concurrently.
• The Thread Scheduler decides the order of 
execution for each thread.

[PAGE 7]

• Thread Life Cycle in Java

[PAGE 8]

Java Thread Priority in Multithreading 
• Java allows multiple threads to run concurrently,
and the Thread Scheduler decides the order of 
execution.  
• Each thread has a priority level, which determines
the order in which it will be executed.
• The highest priority thread is always executed first.
